art_market.summary: March 22, 2026, marks the end of a busy week in Seoul's art scene, with multiple significant exhibitions closing today.
closing_today: My Very Favorite - Thousand-Character Classic (Seoul Calligraphy Art Museum)
Klimt and Ricci Oddi Miracle (The My Art Museum)
Artist Research: Unfinished Flora & Time Blooms (SeMA)
ongoing: Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center (until June 28)
Form into Color by March Avery at Esther Schipper (until April 25)
Damien Hirst Retrospective at MMCA Seoul (Ongoing)

stock_market.summary: Markets are closed for the weekend. Analyzing the previous week: The KOSPI closed at 5,781.20 on Friday (+0.31%). Sentiment remains cautious due to ongoing geopolitical risks and bubble concerns, with analysts emphasizing fundamental-driven earnings strategies for Monday's open.

key_indicators.Key_Drivers: Geopolitical risks, Q1 earnings focus, potential volatility.
